input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.11.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.11.1
            TITLE: any item which meets all three of:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.11.1: Any item which meets all three of:
F.5.11.1 Any item which meets all three of: 
• Located outside the Component Envelope  F.1.15 
• Located above 350 mm from the ground  
• Could load the Main Hoop, Main Hoop Brace, or Shoulder Harness Mounting during a 
rollover

final_answer: Any item which meets all three of: • Located outside the Component Envelope F.1.15 • Located above 350 mm from the ground • Could load the Main Hoop, Main Hoop Brace, or Shoulder Harness Mounting during a rollover
